paragraphs.text: 종합 운영 지침서 및 일일 체크리스트
오픈부터 마감까지 — 하루 워크플로우 완벽 가이드
매 근무의 시작. 안전과 준비가 하루의 기준을 세운다.
근무의 핵심. 모든 품목을 정확한 스펙으로 준비. ⭐ = 필수 베스트셀러.
고마진 특수 부위. 주문 스펙을 정확히 따라야 수율 손실을 방지할 수 있다.
📋 입고 검수 체크리스트 — 프리미엄 컧 입고 시 사용
모든 품목에 정해진 자리가 있다. 오전 11시까지 빈 공간 제로.
⭐ 앞줄: 베스트셀러 & 고마진 제품만. 3m에서 보여야 함. 보충 최우선.
🔵 하단 1열: 준주력 및 특수 컧. 30분 이내 보충.
🟣 하단 2열: 뼈, 탕재료, 대량. 11시까지 완전 채움.
📏 11시 빈 공간 제로. 빈 곳 = 즉시 보충.
🔄 FIFO 항상. 오래된 것 앞으로. 보충마다 날짜 확인.
근무 전체에 걸쳐 품질, 위생, 진열 기준을 유지한다.
식품 안전은 타협 불가. 2시간마다 예외 없이 기록.
측정하면 관리된다. 매일 기록, 매주 검토, 계속 개선.
하루를 강하게 마무리. 깔끔한 마감이 내일의 원활한 오픈을 만든다.

tables.text: "Peeled/Denuded" — Membrane must be fully removed before delivery.
"Whole" form only. Do NOT accept pre-sliced.
INSIDE skirt only — not Outside. Inside = correct Korean Anchangsal.
"Peeled" required. Without this spec, yield loss reaches 40%.
PRIME GRADE required. Choice grade = reject for grilling use.
Must be separated from Shoulder Clod. Verify clean seam.
"Peeled" — membrane and bone-side tissue fully removed.
"Boneless" and "Trimmed" — verify both specs on every delivery.
"Denuded" — all external fat must be removed.
⚠️ Do NOT confuse with Ribeye Cap. Different cut, different price.
이상한 냄새, 변색, 과다한 육즙 없음
육류 색상 및 품질 정기 확인

paragraphs.text: From Opening to Closing — A Complete Daily Workflow Guide
Start every shift right. Safety and preparation set the standard for the entire day.
The core of your shift. Prep every item to exact specifications. ⭐ = Must-stock best sellers.
High-margin specialty cuts. Ordering specs MUST be followed exactly to prevent yield loss.
📋 RECEIVING INSPECTION CHECKLIST — Use when accepting premium cut deliveries
Every item has its place. Zero visible gaps by 11:00 AM. Follow this planogram exactly.
⭐ FRONT ROW: Best sellers & highest-margin cuts ONLY. Visible from 3m. Refill priority = HIGHEST.
🔵 BOTTOM ROW 1: Secondary movers and specialty cuts. Refill within 30 min of gap.
🟣 BOTTOM ROW 2: Bone cuts, soup items, bulk. Must be fully stocked by 11AM.
📏 ZERO GAP at 11:00 AM. ANY empty space = immediate restock.
🔄 FIFO always. Oldest product at front of each slot. Check dates on every restock.
Maintain quality, hygiene, and display standards throughout your entire shift.
Food safety is non-negotiable. Record temperatures every 2 hours without exception.
What gets measured gets managed. Track daily, review weekly, improve continuously.
End the day strong. A clean close means a smooth open tomorrow.

tables.text: Inspect meat display for proper organization
Check for expired or near-expiration products
Verify all items are properly labeled with dates
Check meat case lights are working
Wipe down display case glass (inside & outside)
Ensure cutting boards and knives are clean & sanitized
Organize meat storage in walk-in cooler
Put on clean apron and gloves

Correct cut name matches purchase order
No off-odor, discoloration, or excess purge
Packaging intact, no tears or contamination
Supplier lot number and date recorded
Rotate stock — FIFO (First In, First Out)
Check meat color and quality regularly
Remove discolored or spoiled items immediately
Keep display case organized and attractive
Restock items as needed throughout shift
Change gloves frequently (especially between raw meats)
Clean cutting boards and knives after each use
Check display case temperature every 2 hours
Dispose of trim and waste properly
Wear gloves at all times when handling meat
Change gloves between different meat types
Use separate cutting boards for different meats
Sanitize work surfaces with approved sanitizer
Never cross-contaminate cooked and raw products
Report any cuts or injuries immediately
Record final temperatures in Temperature Log (Chapter 6)
Cover or wrap all displayed meat properly
Store all meat products in walk-in cooler
Clean and sanitize ALL cutting boards and knives
Wipe down and sanitize all work surfaces
Clean meat display case thoroughly (inside & outside)
Sweep and mop entire floor area
Take out trash and sanitize trash cans
Complete Weekly KPI entry in Chapter 7
Turn off display case lights (if applicable)

paragraphs.text: MANUAL INTEGRAL DE OPERACIONES Y LISTA DE VERIFICACIÓN
De Apertura a Cierre — Guía Completa del Flujo de Trabajo Diario
Fecha: ____________    Sucursal: ____________    Turno: ☐ AM  ☐ PM    Empleado: ____________    Gerente: ____________
Comience cada turno correctamente. La seguridad y preparación establecen el estándar del día.
El corazón de su turno. Prepare cada artículo según especificaciones exactas. ⭐ = Productos obligatorios.
Cortes de alto margen. Las especificaciones de pedido DEBEN seguirse exactamente.
Cada artículo tiene su lugar. Cero espacios vacíos a las 11:00 AM.
⭐ FILA FRONTAL: Solo productos estrella y de mayor margen. Prioridad de reabastecimiento = MÁXIMA.
🔵 FILA INFERIOR 1: Productos secundarios y especiales. Reabastecer dentro de 30 min.
🟣 FILA INFERIOR 2: Huesos, sopas, a granel. Completo antes de las 11AM.
📏 CERO ESPACIOS a las 11:00 AM. Cualquier espacio vacío = reabastecimiento inmediato.
🔄 PEPS siempre. Producto más antiguo al frente.
Mantenga calidad, higiene y estándares de exhibición durante todo su turno.
La seguridad alimentaria no es negociable. Registre temperaturas cada 2 horas.
Lo que se mide se mejora. Registre diario, revise semanal, mejore continuamente.
Termine el día bien. Un buen cierre significa una apertura sin problemas mañana.

tables.text: Verificar temperatura del cuarto frío — Registrar: ___°F
Revisar productos vencidos o próximos a vencer
Verificar etiquetas de fecha en todos los productos
Limpiar vidrio del exhibidor (interior y exterior)
Asegurar tablas y cuchillos limpios y sanitizados

Grado coincide con especificación (Prime / Choice / Select)

Sin mal olor, decoloración o exceso de líquido
Empaque intacto, sin roturas o contaminación
Número de lote y fecha del proveedor registrados
Rotar inventario — PEPS (Primero en Entrar, Primero en Salir)
Limpiar tablas y cuchillos después de cada uso
Cambiar guantes entre tipos de carne
Usar tablas separadas para diferentes carnes
Nunca contaminar productos cocidos con crudos
Cubrir o envolver toda la carne exhibida
Almacenar todos los productos en cuarto frío
Limpiar y sanitizar TODAS las tablas y cuchillos
Limpiar y sanitizar todas las superficies
Barrer y trapear toda el área
